Shamanistic Shenanigan Chestplate  
 

Lore Item No Trade
Slot: CHEST
AC: 52
STR: +5 WIS: +15 INT: +15 HP: +60 MANA: +40
SV DISEASE: +15 SV MAGIC: +10 SV POISON: +15
WT: 6.0 Size: MEDIUM
Class: SHM
Race: BAR ELF TRL OGR IKS VAH FRG
Slot 1, Type 7 (General: Group)
Slot 2, Type 21 (Special Ornamentation)
Shamanistic Shenanigan Chestplate
Lore Item No Trade
Slot: CHEST
AC: 52
STR: +5 WIS: +15 INT: +15 HP: +60 MANA: +40
SV DISEASE: +15 SV MAGIC: +10 SV POISON: +15
WT: 6.0 Size: MEDIUM
Class: SHM
Race: BAR ELF TRL OGR IKS VAH FRG
Slot 1, Type 7 (General: Group)
Slot 2, Type 21 (Special Ornamentation)

Item Type:Armor
Appearance:Velious Chain 2
Tint:
 
Color (RGB):80, 80, 100
Light:Stein of Tears
Stackable:No
Lucy Entry By:Saden
Item Updated By:Oxgoad
Source:Live
IC Last Updated:2019-03-03 05:56:53
Page Updated:Thu Oct 9th, 2008

Expansion: Scars of Velious
Rarity: Very Rare
Level to Attain: 55
[Comments ]

This item is the result of a quest.
Expansion List - Premium only.
Quest Name
The Gift Box
Crafted: This item is crafted by players.
  • Shamanistic Shenannigan Chestplate (Non-Tradeskill)
    • Expansion: Not Set
    Yield: 1 x Shamanistic Shenanigan Chestplate

Zone(s) Found In:


Zone Name
Plane of Mischief 2.0


Uploaded November 27th, 2008

wow...even this is in all honestly a PoS nowadays...its got about the same AC as the shaman BP from 68.1....and it makes me feel gimp =(

# Sep 04 2002 at 8:12 AM Rating: Decent
__DEL__1591782282989
4 posts
This BP rivals the Wolfcaller's BP, and sounds much cooler =) I think I'd wear this over my Chestplate of Vindication, just to show off that I had completed a PoM quest
▲ Page top
looks?
QuoteReply
# Sep 03 2002 at 7:24 PM Rating: Default
__DEL__1592253170947
60 posts
im just curious, but what does this set look like? im loving the stats, but i just hope its not pink, like the one druid BP (which they deserve). thenks! =D
▲ Page top
great bp indeed
QuoteReply
# Sep 03 2001 at 7:26 AM Rating: Decent
__DEL__1591749817370
Scholar
397 posts
This will most likely serve as your most used breastplate once you obtain it. With stats like these it's gotta be close to even the Luclin epic breastplate quest, which will probably take twice as long to complete.

I know one guy on my server who has this bp and i'm so damn pissed at him =P oh well... /slaps his pog bp... better you than nothing buddy.

anyhow if yer in an uber guild you already know about these quests... they take a couple months to make all the dolls for everyone then a week or two to finish each quest, depending how the drops are.

You have to go through the Forbidden area in temple of veeshan to get to plane of mischief? I dunno... either way it aint easy at all to get there, so don't even think you will ever get there if you are not lvl 60 or needed direly (cleric chanter) Plus if yer a 60 shammy you can solo there =) get yerself and some guildies some cards for their quests as well.

Thats about all I know on this breastplate... whoever has them are lucky bastages I'll tell you that much, because the stats on these are just plain ownage... even blows away skyshrine bp.
▲ Page top
RE: great bp indeed
QuoteReply
# Jan 08 2006 at 2:49 AM Rating: Decent
__DEL__1592253435944
Scholar
33 posts
theres a little itty bitty teeny weeny castle tucked in the river at the far end of the zone in great divide, click this and it will port you into PoM. Take a porter with you though unless you know which tree to click on that will port you to cobalt scar!
▲ Page top
RE: great bp indeed
